notes: All 9 Q8 model variants achieved perfect verbatim transcription of the Python code, correctly capturing every key fact (FastAPI import, User BaseModel class, @app.post decorator, db.add/await db.commit). The differentiators are entirely in the quality of surrounding analysis and the degree of color/syntax-highlighting hallucination. The 7 models scored 9 differ mainly in subtle color description accuracy; the 2 models scored 8 (glm-4.6v-flash-9b and qwen3.5-9b nothink) have explicit misclassifications (post-as-keyword, methods-as-builtins, None-as-string). No model failed to read the code; this image is an 'easy' OCR task for code-reading VLMs at Q8 quantization. The deterministic score (10.0 for all) accurately reflects perfect transcription; holistic scores differentiate on surrounding analysis quality. No notable difference between think/nothink variants for this image — both modes succeed equally on this simple code-reading task.
